utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 items are present. Each item is fully specified with the required details: 
- health_coverage includes both physical and mental health coverage with specific plan names, monthly and annual costs, and mentions an add-on with costs. 
- property_coverage includes home coverage with plan name, monthly and annual costs, and an add-on with costs. 
- travel_coverage includes travel insurance with plan name, monthly and annual costs, and an add-on with costs. 
- additional_services lists the enhancement services with monthly and annual costs. 
- total_budget provides a complete monthly and annual cost breakdown. All are fully specified as per the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: First, I identified all the specific plans and add-ons mentioned in the AI assistant's final coverage plan. These are: Physical Health: PrimeCare Premium Plan, Mental Health: EliteCare Premium Plan, Preventive Care Package (health add-on), Property: PrimeHome Premium Coverage, Emergency Response Service (property add-on), Travel: PrimeTravel Premium Plan, Premium Medical Network (travel add-on). Then, I matched each of these items to their exact name in the ground-truth ratings and retrieved the corresponding rating number.
